mapper.insert: INSERT INTO mcp_gateway(gateway_id, gateway_name, gateway_desc, status, create_time, update_time) VALUES(#{gatewayId}, #{gatewayName}, #{gatewayDesc}, #{status}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.select: SELECT id, gateway_id, gateway_name, gateway_desc, status, create_time, update_time FROM mcp_gateway ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT id, gateway_id, gateway_name, gateway_desc, status, create_time, update_time FROM mcp_gateway WHERE status = #{status} ORDER BY create_time DESC
